title: Autographed Gendo Picture by Robin Williams
display_title: Autographed Gendo Picture by Robin Williams
wikitext:
[]: Autographed Gendo Picture by Robin Williams             Quote Post by sephiroticvm » Sun Dec 21, 2014 12:33 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 21, 2014 12:36 am Keep it. Don't ever sell it. The man was a freakin' genius. Yes, I'm still in shock he's gone.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Dec 21, 2014 12:41 am Get your ass to an A.C. Moore, a Michael's or any arts & crafts store and frame that bitch, ASAP.

[]: Re: Autographed Gendo Picture by Robin Williams             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Dec 21, 2014 2:25 am ^Looks like 8.5 x 11" and those frames are easy to get. Keep it out of direct sunlight though. sephiroticvm wrote: How much do you think this one is worth?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sun Dec 21, 2014 2:47 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Keep it. Don't ever sell it. The man was a freakin' genius.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Mon Dec 22, 2014 1:36 am It's at least worth a couple hundred.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Dec 22, 2014 8:53 pm Tumbling Down wrote: It's at least worth a couple hundred.

[]:             Quote Post by fizz450_03 » Thu Dec 25, 2014 5:52 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Keep it. Don't ever sell it. The man was a freakin' genius. Yes, I'm still in shock he's gone.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Thu Dec 25, 2014 8:17 pm fizz450_03 wrote: I admired him highly, and since he is a fan of Eva, my opinion of him just went higher. It would've been cool if he did play Gendo in a live action thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Dec 25, 2014 9:38 pm That's is pretty amazing that you own something like this, and I would keep it. If you wanted to sell it I agree that it would at least a few hundred(likely much more).

[]: Re: Autographed Gendo Picture by Robin Williams             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Dec 25, 2014 11:43 pm sephiroticvm wrote: How much do you think this one is worth?

[]:             Quote Post by fizz450_03 » Fri Dec 26, 2014 1:33 am xPearse wrote: I personally don't think he would have made a good choice for Gendo, yea I know he can play serious roles but I'd find it ridiculous if they casted him for a LA Gendo. He's done too many comedy and funny movies for me to take him playing such a role seriously, and I don't think he could pull it off. But, does anyone think he could have actually pulled it off?

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Fri Dec 26, 2014 2:15 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Keep it. Don't ever sell it. The man was a freakin' genius.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Fri Dec 26, 2014 9:22 am fizz450_03 wrote: I thought that he just might pull it off in his own way.
